title: ZNetwork field wire — egress convert, ingress deconvert, field-to-field when both ends field
motto: Plain packets on the wire; field amplitude only inside field computers. Two field ends talk as one belt — no nested field stack on the link.

egress.rule: Collapse panel truth to one amplitude; serialize only signed field-io packet envelopes on the wire — not raw field JSON files

transit.plain_wire: TLS 1.3 minimum when crossing untrusted hops; inner envelope HMAC-sealed

ingress.rule: Verify sovereign-time + package key + gatekeeper IFF before amplitude joins local 2D platform — depth stays 0

field_to_field.direct_talk: When both peers run field computers (Grok16 prefix + ZNetwork SHADOW or ACTIVE), belt envelopes pass without OS stack field-on-field — one amplitude per machine, one envelope per hop
field_to_field.defield_on_rest: If peer rests on an existing field surface, defield before attach (AmmoCode doctrine)

wire_point.rotation: receipt-bound — updates when operator publishes new sovereign receipt
wire_point.lookup: invite-only mesh — no public WAN scan (AmmoCode network doctrine)

update_flow: operator types display name (public label only)
operator sets wire_point via local ZNetwork panel — not raw street address in cloud
connection-gatekeeper.py scores peer before directory row visible to friends

anti_fake.friend_path: manual invite or LAN beacon with MITM pin (AmmoCode security-manage)

anti_theft.beacon_pin: TOFU fingerprint on first tunnel connect
anti_theft.receipt_ledger: append-only local jsonl — no PII export

options: LAN polite beacon (port 9555) on trusted networks
Invite URL with one-time token (collab room)
Wire-point rotation via sovereign receipt — sync when both online
Optional physical anchor: USB sovereign key file (no SMS)
rejected: SMS OTP as sole root of trust

field_stream_mode.title: Forced field stream — steady state no app packets, FEC only on loss
field_stream_mode.motto: Take over the lane, hold one amplitude stream, speak only when correcting.

steady.note: L2 Ethernet frames may still exist; field layer has no discrete app packets between peers

thermal_venting.rule: Spread stream heat across venting dies — never concentrate at NIC endpoints
thermal_venting.spread: route high thermo_proxy slabs to venting tier dies before global backoff

znetwork_modes.shadow: read-only taps + receipts; field_stream_mode blocked until lab_locked clears
znetwork_modes.active: blocked until ZNETWORK_REVIEW_APPROVED=1 and checklist approved

safety_concerns.risk: Shipping nested field JSON heats both ends
safety_concerns.mitigation: field-io packet envelopes only; max_field_depth 0 at ingress

safety_concerns.risk: Central name→address DB is a theft target
safety_concerns.mitigation: no central DB; wire_points opaque; friends list local
truth_gate + gatekeeper hostility score; no anonymous open WAN

safety_concerns.risk: Maxing bandwidth with field_opt stacks compute heat
safety_concerns.mitigation: field_physics profile on sustained field wire; token-bucket per peer
REVIEW_ONLY default; human checklist for ACTIVE

safety_concerns.risk: Exclusive stream blocks other peers / looks like hijack
safety_concerns.mitigation: per-peer token bucket; SHADOW only until review; operator confirm dialog

safety_concerns.risk: Lossy link triggers repair storm → thermal spike
safety_concerns.mitigation: field-thermal-guard backoff_ms; spread repair across venting dies; field_physics profile

safety_concerns.risk: Attacker floods stream without truth_gate handshake
safety_concerns.mitigation: handshake packets mandatory; gatekeeper drops unauthenticated steady bytes
